service.name: Pexels API
service.description_for_ai: Free stock photos and videos API. 4M+ high-quality photos and videos. No attribution required for most uses. 200 req/hr free. Alternative to Unsplash. Use for adding visual content to apps, websites, presentations.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Search free stock photos by keyword. Returns high-quality images with multiple size options.

color.description: red, orange, yellow, green, blue, purple, pink, white, black

capabilities.description_for_ai: Search free stock videos by keyword.

agent_hints.attribution: Photos technically require attribution but Pexels allows free use without it for most purposes. Always credit photographer when possible.
agent_hints.sizes: src.original=full size, src.large=1920px, src.medium=1280px, src.small=640px, src.tiny=280px
